name: visual-proof-pi-package
description: Dependency-free Pi package for Visual Proof Objects and deterministic UI visual predicate verification.

extensions.name: Visual Proof
extensions.description: Registers tools for creating, evaluating, and reporting Visual Proof Objects.

skills.name: Visual Proof
skills.description: Proof-only workflow for creating and evaluating Visual Proof Objects from supplied metadata, primitives, predicates, and evidence.

skills.name: Visual Primitives
skills.description: Drawing and pointing workflow for producing VP1-compatible boxes, points, and paths from supplied screenshots.

skills.name: Browser Capture
skills.description: Capture and metadata workflow for producing VP1-ready screenshot, route or URL, viewport, and after-video metadata from supplied or existing browser-tool outputs.

skills.name: DOM Bridge
skills.description: DOM and evidence adapter workflow for turning selectors, DOM boxes, hit tests, computed styles, accessibility snapshots, and text sources into candidate VP1 primitives and explicit evidence.

skills.name: Visual Fix Loop
skills.description: Orchestration workflow for reproduce, capture, primitives, proof draft, fix, recapture, and final proof loops that delegates VP1 verdicts to visual-proof.
